title: Zero In Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Killer. Pheromone Technology. Poison-Free. Monitor Infestations. Hang in Wardrobes and Stand in Cupboards and Drawers, white
features: Demi-diamond clothes moth pheromone trap catches clothing moths and prevents them from damaging woollens, silk, furs and natural fibres in household wardrobes and cupboards
Chemical and poison-free clothes moth repellent lasts for up to 12 weeks
Fragrance-free, non-staining treatment does not drip - protects natural fabrics
Killer glue traps are designed by experts and tested by pest control professionals
Refill with Zero In Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Killer refills to prevent moth damage to precious clothing for a further 24 weeks
description: From the manufacturer The Zero In range of products from STV International provide pest control against a variety of household pests, including fleas, ants, flies, bed bugs, clothes moths, and more. Refill with Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Trap Refills (ZER438). Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Trap Millions of satisfied users Protect clothes in storage by monitoring with a proven pheromone technology from Zero In. The Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Trap is designed by experts and tested by professionals, with millions sold worldwide. The traps are a discreet and effective way to monitor clothes moth infestations and protect delicate woollens and fabrics. Poison-free and easy to use, clothes moths are attracted into the trap from which they cannot escape so you know they are there and can treat the infestation. Monitors clothes moth infestations. Suitable for drawers, cupboards and wardrobes. Integrated hanger - hang or stand. Poison-free pheromone monitoring. Re-usable - refill with Zero In Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Trap Refills Product Highlights Poison-Free Monitoring Safe for use around children and pets, these easy-to-use traps contain a natural clothes moth pheromone to monitor clothes moths. Infestation warning The natural pheromone lures male moths into the trap where they will be immediately caught on the adhesive strip, so that you can see if you have an infestation to treat. Protects Clothes in Storage Suitable for use in wardrobes, cupboards, and drawers to monitor for clothes moths so you can treat the problem with a moth control product. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, balls, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Demi Diamond Clothes Moth Trap from Zero In What are the signs of clothes moths Visible damage to clothing, seeing larvae and/or adult moths Clothes most at risk from moths are protein-based fibres, such as cashmere, wool, silk or leather Moth damage on clothes looks like holes- the bigger the hole, the longer the moth has been undisturbed while eating Why use the Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Trap Uses pheromones rather than chemicals to trap moths Treats a standard wardrobe area for up to 12 weeks Refills are available for convenience (ZER438) Can be hung or stood in wardrobes Sticky glue trap catches and holds moths fast Directions for use Carefully open the trap and remove the glue board Peel back the release paper to activate the pheromone lure Fit the glue board back into the trap with the sticky side facing outwards Use the Clothes Moth Trap free-standing or hanging in wardrobe areas.
